𖹭adult ao'nung𖹭

ao'nung can't help himself. no matter how much he tries to ignore it he knows deep inside that his feelings for you are true. so as he's at the cove of the ancestors and spots you, he can't help but wonder if this is eywa's way of telling him? maybe if you did it for just a moment, only to know if it felt right?

just the tip? jk. unlike ao'nung i am of course well aware the odds of pulling away from that are very low, so i have doubled my usual effort of writing the mating/tsaheylu desc!
